title: Curran wants chance to replace Stokes in Test team | Cricket News
description: Sam Curran wants the opportunity to fill the vacancy left by Ben Stokes, but says he will not be putting pressure on himself to make a return to Test cricket.
excerpt: Sam Curran wants the opportunity to fill the vacancy left by Ben Stokes, but says he will not be putting pressure on himself to make a return to Test cricket.
imageAlt: Cricket news: Curran wants chance to replace Stokes in Test team

blocks.text: Cricket update: Curran wants chance to replace Stokes in Test team. Sam Curran wants the opportunity to fill the vacancy left by Ben Stokes, but says he will not be putting pressure on himself to make a return to Test cricket.
